name: Masoor Dahl Soup (Lentil Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil 2 1/2 cups water in a saucepan.
2. Add turmeric, garlic, peppercorns, and onion to the boiling water.
3. Stir in lentils and salt.
4. Bring mixture back to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until lentils are cooked through and most of the liquid has evaporated (about 20 minutes).
6. Mash or grind the lentils with some water if needed.
7. Return the mashed lentils to the saucepan.
8. Add 6 cups water and bring back to a boil.
9. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for an additional 10 to 15 minutes.
10. Stir in lemon juice and adjust seasoning with salt, to taste.
11. Serve soup as is or pair it with boiled rice.
